headline: Packaging, Forest Products Face Lackluster Demand, Weak Volumes, BofA Says
summary: Packaging and forest products companies face lackluster demand and weak volumes outside beverage can

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Packaging Corp of America, Raises Price Target to $263
summary: B of A Securities  analyst George Staphos   maintains Packaging Corp of America (NYSE:PKG) with a Buy and raises the price target from $242 to $263.
